title: document models have 37 available operations across 7 categories
content:
# document models have 37 available operations across 7 categories

The document model document type (`powerhouse/document-model`) supports 37 operations:

| Category | Operations | Count |
|----------|-----------|-------|
| Header Management | SET_MODEL_NAME, SET_MODEL_ID, SET_MODEL_EXTENSION, SET_MODEL_DESCRIPTION, SET_AUTHOR_NAME, SET_AUTHOR_WEBSITE | 6 |
| Module Management | ADD_MODULE, SET_MODULE_NAME, SET_MODULE_DESCRIPTION, DELETE_MODULE, REORDER_MODULES | 5 |
| Operation Management | ADD_OPERATION, SET_OPERATION_NAME, SET_OPERATION_SCHEMA, SET_OPERATION_DESCRIPTION, SET_OPERATION_TEMPLATE, SET_OPERATION_REDUCER, MOVE_OPERATION, DELETE_OPERATION, REORDER_MODULE_OPERATIONS | 9 |
| Error Management | ADD_OPERATION_ERROR, SET_OPERATION_ERROR_CODE, SET_OPERATION_ERROR_NAME, SET_OPERATION_ERROR_DESCRIPTION, SET_OPERATION_ERROR_TEMPLATE, DELETE_OPERATION_ERROR, REORDER_OPERATION_ERRORS | 7 |
| Example Management | ADD_OPERATION_EXAMPLE, UPDATE_OPERATION_EXAMPLE, DELETE_OPERATION_EXAMPLE, REORDER_OPERATION_EXAMPLES | 4 |
| State Management | SET_STATE_SCHEMA, SET_INITIAL_STATE, ADD_STATE_EXAMPLE, UPDATE_STATE_EXAMPLE, DELETE_STATE_EXAMPLE, REORDER_STATE_EXAMPLES | 6 |
| Versioning | ⚠️ Not implemented | 0 |

Since [[versioning operations on document models are not implemented]], the versioning category is unusable.

---

description: Header (6), module (5), operation (9), error (7), example (4), state (6), versioning (0 — not implemented) management categories
